name: Shrimp Saute with Orzo
recipeIngredient: 20 large shrimp, peeled and deveined, tails left on
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a medium saucepan of salted water to a boil. Add orzo; cook until al dente, using the cooking time suggested on the package. Drain; toss with 1 teaspoon oil and add salt and pepper to taste.
2. Meanwhile, heat remaining olive oil in a large skillet. Add garlic; cook over low heat for 1 minute. Add shrimp, salt and pepper to taste, and 2 tablespoons parsley; cook for 3 to 4 minutes. Turn and cook for 3 minutes more or until opaque. Remove from pan and keep warm.
3. Add lemon juice and wine to skillet. Bring to a boil, then lower heat and reduce by half, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat. Stir in remaining parsley; butter, lemon zest, and capers. Adjust seasonings. Pour over shrimp, and serve on a bed of orzo.
